auxiliary_mode.description: Specifies the mode for auxiliary configurations.

auxiliary_sku.description: Specifies the SKU for auxiliary settings.

edge_zone.description: Defines the edge zone for the network interface.

internal_dns_name_label.description: Sets the internal DNS name label for the interface.

name.description: The name of the network interface.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource.

ip_configuration.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource.
ip_configuration.type: list(object({name: string, gateway_load_balancer_frontend_ip_configuration_id: string, subnet_id: string, private_ip_address_version: string, private_ip_address_allocation: string, public_ip_address_id: string, primary: bool, private_ip_address: string}))

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
